zh.lifeSummary: 當Ulrich III von Pfirt於1286年出生在法國阿爾薩斯豪吉爾霍恩普費爾特時，他的父親Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette30歲，母親Katharina von Klingen32歲。他於1309年與Jeanne de Bourgogne結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1324年3月11日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可貝爾享年38歲，埋葬在奧地利斯泰爾馬可費爾德巴賀。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ulrich III von Pfirt于1286年出生在法国阿爾薩斯豪吉爾霍恩普費爾特时，他的父亲Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette30岁，母亲Katharina von Klingen32岁。他于1309年与Jeanne de Bourgogne结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1324年3月11日在英国英格兰諾福爾可貝爾享年38岁，埋葬在奥地利斯泰爾馬可費爾德巴賀。

nameMeanings.name: Pfirt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Peart
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Perth (Perths), which is recorded as Pertc. 1128. The placename derives from Pictish perta ‘(at the) thicket, copse’.
English: nickname, probably from a shortened form of Middle English, Old French apert ‘open, plain to see’, of persons ‘frank, honest’ or ‘accomplished’.

nameMeanings.name: Ulrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from uodal ‘riches’ + rīc ‘power’; the name of two major German saints, Ulrich of Augsburg ( d. 973 ) and Ulrich of Cluny ( c.1018–93 ), and the Blessed Ulrich of Einsiedeln in Switzerland ( d. c.980 ).

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Ronald .  It is sometimes used as a given name in its own right.

variants.name: Ronald
meanings: From the Old Norse personal name Rögnvaldr (composed of regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + valdr ‘ruler’). This name was regularly used in the Middle Ages in northern England and Scotland, where Scandinavian influence was strong. It is now widespread throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Ulrich III von Pfirt was born in 1286, in Hohenpfirt, Haut-Rhin, Alsace, France, his father, Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette, was 30 and his mother, Katharina von Klingen, was 32. He married Jeanne de Bourgogne in 1309. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 11 March 1324, in Bale, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38, and was buried in Feldbach, Styria, Austria.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ulrich III von Pfirt est né en 1286, à Hohenpfirt, Haut-Rhin, Alsace, France, son père, Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Katharina von Klingen, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Bourgogne en 1309. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 11 mars 1324, à Bale, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Feldbach, Styrie, Autriche.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ulrich III von Pfirt 1286 in Hohenpfirt, Haut-Rhin, Elsaß, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette 30 und seine Mutter Katharina von Klingen 32. Er hat 1309 Jeanne de Bourgogne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 11. März 1324 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Bale, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Feldbach, Steiermark, Österreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ulrich III von Pfirt è nato il nel 1286 nel Hohenpfirt, Haut-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, il suo padre, Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Katharina von Klingen, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de Bourgogne nel 1309. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 11 marzo 1324, nel Bale, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Feldbach, Steiermark, Austria.

ja.lifeSummary: Ulrich III von Pfirtが1286年にフランスアルサスハウト-ルヒンホーヘンプフィルトで生まれた時，父Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferretteは30歳，母Katharina von Klingenは32歳であった。1309年にJeanne de Bourgogneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1324年3月11日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクボーで38歳で死去し，オーストリアステイエルマークフエルドバチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ulrich III von Pfirt(이)가 1286년 프랑스 알사스 하트-히 호헨p피르트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Katharina von Klingen(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1309년 Jeanne de Bourgogne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1324년 3월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 베일에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 오스트리아 스테이마크 펠드바치에 묻혔다.

mn.Bale, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdo: Bale, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ulrich III von Pfirt nasceu em 1286, em Hohenpfirt, Haut-Rhin, Alsace, França, seu pai, Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Katharina von Klingen, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Bourgogne em 1309. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 11 de março de 1324, em Bale, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Feldbach, Steiermark, Áustria.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ulrich III von Pfirt родился в 1286 г. в местности хохенпфирт, хаут-рин, алсеис, Франция, его отцу по имени Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Katharina von Klingen, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Bourgogne в 1309 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 11 марта 1324 г. в местности беил, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности фелдбач, стиирмарк, Австрия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ulrich III von Pfirt nació en 1286, en Hohenpfirt, Haut-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, su papá, Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Katharina von Klingen, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Jeanne de Bourgogne en 1309. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 11 de marzo de 1324, en Bale, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Feldbach, Steiermark, Austria.
